nodes.label: NCLPDLB — Pokemon Draft League Discord Bot
DraftLeagueBot (discord.py commands.Bot subclass)
Draft Formats: Snake, Auction, Tiered, Adaptive Banning
AlphaZero-style ML Pipeline (BattleTransformer + MCTS self-play)
BattleTransformer (policy head + value head)
ReplayBuffer (thread-safe circular buffer)
MCTS Ladder Training (bot vs real opponents on play.pokemonshowdown.com)
Google Sheets 17-tab backend (single source of truth for league data)
SQLite local state database (pokemon_draft.db)
poke-env (Python Pokemon Showdown client)
Standalone Windows .exe (PyInstaller, no server needed)
ELO Rating System (K=32, default 1000, per-league)
Analytics Service (type coverage, weaknesses, speed tiers, threat score, archetype)
Draft Service (core draft engine, in-memory _active_drafts dict)
Team Service (CRUD + Showdown import/export)
Battle Sim (heuristic matchup scoring + Showdown replay parsing)
/spar Command (battle trained AI agent live on Pokemon Showdown)
FastAPI Training Dashboard (localhost:8080, /stats, /start, /stop, /config)
run_training.py (wires SelfPlayLoop + PolicyTrainer + FastAPI dashboard)
src/config.py — Settings singleton (pydantic-settings, reads .env)
src/bot/main.py — DraftLeagueBot entry point, cog loader, hash-gated sync
Bot Cogs (draft, team, stats, league, sheet, admin, misc)
Bot Views (draft_view, team_view, team_import_view)
src/data/models.py — All Pydantic v2 models (Pokemon, Draft, DraftPick, etc.)
src/data/sheets.py — gspread sync wrapper; Tab constants, cell-specific writes
src/data/pokeapi.py — PokéAPI client + in-memory pokemon_db cache
src/data/showdown.py — Showdown format/tier data fetcher
src/data/smogon.py — Smogon tier scraping
src/ml/battle_env.py — Gymnasium env (BattleEnv singles + BattleDoubleEnv doubles)
src/ml/transformer_model.py — BattleTransformer Transformer policy/value network
src/ml/mcts.py — Monte Carlo Tree Search decision engine (MCTSPlayer)
src/ml/self_play.py — SelfPlayLoop (AccountA vs AccountB via poke-env)
src/ml/trainer.py — ReplayBuffer + PolicyTrainer (trains BattleTransformer)
src/ml/train_policy.py — PPO training entry point (stable-baselines3, legacy)
src/ml/train_all.py — Sequential format training (10 formats, 500k steps each, legacy)
src/ml/feature_extractor.py — Custom SB3-compatible feature extractor
src/ml/type_chart.py — Gen 9 type effectiveness chart
src/ml/showdown_player.py — poke-env player using trained model for /spar
src/ml/showdown_client.py — 3-layer WebSocket client for Showdown
src/ml/replay_parser.py — Parses Showdown replay JSON
src/ml/replay_scraper.py — Scrapes replay URLs from Showdown
src/ml/api.py — FastAPI server for training dashboard
src/ml/models/latest.pt — Trained BattleTransformer weights (PyTorch checkpoint)
Rationale: Draft state is in-memory only (lost on restart)
Rationale: Google Sheets is the database (no SQL migrations needed)
Rationale: Command sync is hash-gated (avoids Discord rate limits)
discord.py>=2.3.2 (Discord bot framework, slash commands, cogs, views)
gspread>=6.0.0 (Google Sheets client)
pydantic>=2.6.0 + pydantic-settings>=2.2.0 (data validation + config)
aiosqlite>=0.20.0 (async SQLite)
poke-env==0.12.1 (Pokemon Showdown RL environment)
stable-baselines3>=2.2.0 (PPO/DQN RL training)
torch>=2.2.0 (PyTorch — install separately per platform)
beautifulsoup4>=4.12.3 + lxml>=5.1.0 (HTML parsing for Smogon scraping)
ruff>=0.3.0 + mypy>=1.9.0 (linting and type checking)
Pokemon Database: 1,025 Gen 1-9 Pokemon in data/pokemon.json
Google Sheets: 17 tabs configured (Setup through Data)
ML Training Blocked on ARM64 Windows (needs x86 Linux for PyTorch)
49/50 commands work without ML training
Phase 01: Observation Space Expansion (OBS_DIM 44→48, MOVE_FEATS 4→5) — COMPLETE
Phase 02: Curriculum Opponent (MaxBasePowerPlayer → self-play graduation at 70% win rate)
Phase 03: Behavioral Cloning Pre-training (planned)
CurriculumCallback (warmup→selfplay state machine, 70% win threshold, 500 episode window)
Bug: Auction bid stub (place_bid does not check existing high bids)
Bug: stellar type missing from feature_extractor.py TYPE_IDS (has 18 types, needs 19)
Bug: Wrong comment in feature_extractor.py (says TOTAL=48, should be TOTAL=19)
Code Quality: print() in production src/ functions (should use log.info/log.warning)
Resolved: .env and credentials.json no longer in repo (secrets removed)
Audit Fixes Patch (audit-fixes.patch + per-file corrections)
FastAPI REST API (localhost:8000 — Pokemon, Drafts, Teams, Standings, Matchups, WebSocket)
WebSocket Live Draft Board (/ws/{guild_id}) — real-time pick/ban/round events
Smogon Gen 9 Tier Hierarchy (AG > Uber > OU > UUBL > UU > ... > ZU > LC)
Draft Commands (/draft-setup, /draft-create, /draft-join, /draft-start, /pick, /ban, /bid)
Team Commands (/team, /team-register, /teamimport, /teamexport, /trade, /legality)
Stats Commands (/analysis, /matchup, /standings, /replay, /match-upload)
Admin Commands (/admin-skip, /admin-pause, /admin-resume, /admin-override-pick, /admin-reset)
GitHub Actions: train-models.yml (matrix of 20 Showdown formats, 300k-500k steps each)
GitHub Actions: codeql.yml (CodeQL security scanning)
GitHub Actions: dependency-submission.yml
Dependabot config (dependabot.yml — automated dependency updates)
Privacy Policy for Colress Bot (NCLPDLB) — last updated March 11, 2026
Terms and Conditions for Colress Bot (NCLPDLB) — last updated March 11, 2026
Security Policy (supported versions, vulnerability reporting)
Deployment Checklist (standalone exe vs run from source, ML training notes)
Project Index: NCLPDLB overview, entry points, core modules summary
Scripts: seed_pokemon_data.py, setup_google_sheet.py, sync_commands.py, scrape_all_formats.py
Google Sheets 17 Tabs: Setup, Rules, Cover, Draft, Draft Board, Pool A/B Boards, Schedule, Match Stats, Standings, Pokemon Stats, MVP Race, Transactions, Playoffs, Pokedex, Team Page Template, Data
ML Supported Formats: gen9randombattle, gen9ou, gen9doublesou, gen9nationaldex, gen9monotype, gen9anythinggoes, gen9vgc2026regi/f, gen7/gen6randombattle
Test Suite: 35 unit test files, 1 integration, 1 e2e, 1 performance (Locust)
Standard Battle Clauses (Species Clause, OHKO Clause, Evasion Clause, Sleep Clause Mod, Endless Battle Clause)
src/services/notification_service.py — Discord embed helpers
src/services/video_service.py — Match video URL storage (Discord CDN links)
src/ml/teambuilder.py — RotatingTeambuilder (constructs Showdown team strings for RL agents)
src/ml/training_doctor.py — Training health diagnostics
src/ml/training_players.py — Baseline opponent players for training
